title: Architecture Waiver
description: Schema for architecture exception/waiver requests that document temporary deviations from enterprise standards or patterns with risk assessment, compensating controls, and remediation plans.

targetAppId.description: The specific application or component requesting the deviation.

targetAppName.description: Display name of the target application.

violatedStandardId.description: The exact ID from standards.json or pattern catalog being bypassed (e.g., STD-SEC-001).

violatedStandardName.description: Display name of the violated standard or pattern.

violatedRequirementIds.description: Specific requirement IDs within the standard that are being waived.

status.description: Current status of the waiver in its lifecycle.

rationale.description: The technical or business reason for the exception.

complianceCost.description: Estimated cost to achieve full compliance now.

delayCost.description: Cost of delaying the project to achieve compliance.

riskExposureCost.description: Estimated cost if the risk materializes during the waiver period.

summary.description: Executive summary of the financial trade-off.

riskDescription.description: Detailed description of the risk exposure during the waiver period.

effectiveness.description: How effective this control is at mitigating the risk.

verificationMethod.description: How compliance with this control is verified.

compensatingControls.description: Specific security or operational measures implemented to mitigate the risk of non-compliance.

requestedBy.description: Name or team that requested the waiver.

requestedDate.description: When the waiver was initially requested.

approvedBy.description: Name or role of the approver (e.g., Chief Architect, CISO).

expirationDate.description: Hard deadline for remediation. Exceptions must be temporary.

description.description: Brief outline of the remediation plan.

backlogItemUrl.description: Link to the engineering backlog item for fixing the deviation.

assignedTeam.description: Team responsible for executing the remediation.

reviewNotes.description: Notes from the Architecture Review Board.
